TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Iraraley, title = Iraraley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iraraley} }

S.FORM: alang Iraraley ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 320 buwan, 921 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 842 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 79 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 87%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Iraraley hya' ga Yayo. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Iraraley ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 320 buwan, 921 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 842 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 79 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 87%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Iraraley hya' ga Yayo. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ iraralej ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu laŋ-s~ɕjo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, jami **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na iraralej ħjaʔ ɣa jajo. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
